evidence: "I watch a lot of science fiction, but this one wasn't compelling."
"I love the way humor and serious scares are combined in this series."
"This series always has new twists and is always well written."
"Non-stop action! I can hardly tear my eyes away."
"I binge on each season as it arrives..."
"Production values of this film were up to 'major motion picture' standards."
"Great acting, great writing, great special effects!"
"I look forward to more Max Martini as a main character and director."
"As always, Supernatural is a super series."
"The period sets and costumes were great..."
"The writers, directors, and actors are all so committed."
"I will miss it, but I hope to see the stars in other ventures very soon!"
"I waited a long time to watch this, but I'm glad I did."

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi and drama genres, particularly enjoying fast-paced narratives with high production quality. They exhibit loyalty to specific creators and appreciate immersive storytelling that evokes emotional responses.
